meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Master Git with AI to eliminate slow development cycles. An advanced checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects at warp speed.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from manual boilerplate and context switching. By integrating AI-driven Git workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code, you automate commit generation, enforce repository standards, and accelerate feature shipping. This setup transforms your terminal into a force-multiplier, allowing you to focus on logic while AI handles the mechanical overhead.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your codebase feels like it's fighting you. Every manual commit, every tedious PR description, and every context-switch between your IDE and terminal is bleeding your hourly rate dry. You aren't just writing code; you are managing a friction-heavy workflow that keeps you trapped in the 'slow lane' of development.

But the paradigm has shifted. By treating your Git workflow as an automated extension of your cognitive process, you can reclaim those lost hours. We are moving beyond simple commits; we are architecting a high-velocity bridge between your terminal and AI intelligence, ensuring that every line of code is documented, versioned, and shipped with surgical precision.

steps.title: Establish an AI-Aware Repository Context
steps.description: Before automating, you must prime your repo so the AI understands your architectural constraints and coding style guide.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and generate a comprehensive .antigravity-context file that outlines our tech stack, linting rules, and preferred commit message format.

steps.title: Automate Semantic Commit Generation
steps.description: Stop wasting time on commit messages. Use AI to inspect staged changes and generate conventional commit strings.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current git diff and draft a concise, conventional-commit compliant message that highlights the business logic changes rather than just file paths.

steps.title: AI-Driven Branch Management
steps.description: Use Claude Code to safely branch, test, and merge features while ensuring no regressions are introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature branch based on the current ticket requirements, ensuring the naming convention follows 'feat/client-name-feature-id'.

steps.title: Intelligent PR Documentation
steps.description: Automatically generate PR descriptions that impress clients by summarizing the impact, risks, and testing steps performed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional PR description summarizing the changes in the current branch, focusing on performance benefits and architectural improvements.

steps.title: Automated Regression Audit
steps.description: Before pushing to production, use AI to perform a final audit of the diff to catch common pitfalls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the staged changes. Identify any potential bottlenecks or unhandled edge cases.

pro_tips: Create a 'thought.md' file in your root directory to store architectural decisions; Claude Code will reference this to maintain consistency across long-term projects.
Use git hooks to trigger your Antigravity prompts automatically, ensuring every commit is pre-vetted for quality before it hits your staging branch.
When working with legacy code, ask Claude to generate 'dependency maps' for specific modules to visualize the impact of your changes before you execute.
Alias your most complex Claude Code commands to short terminal mnemonics (e.g., 'ca' for 'claude audit') to shave seconds off every interaction.
Maintain a 'client-style-guide' file that the AI can reference to automatically format code to match specific client requirements, eliminating manual refactoring.
content.next_steps: After implementing this workflow, audit your deployment logs to measure the time saved per commit and optimize your AI prompts based on the specific feedback patterns of your current client.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the slow lane and start shipping like an elite engineer. Transform your Git workflow into a high-velocity engine that delights clients and maximizes your billable hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
